observe: Four doors out of a vault like this. Prevent it. Avoid it. Detect it. Recover from it. Pick the right one, not just any one.
fault: You reached for detection when this called for prevention. Wrong door doesn't open.
repair: Match the approach to the situation. Not every vault needs the same key.
escape: Choose fast — the wrong approach costs you time you don't have.

observe: Deadlocks can be handled through prevention, avoidance, detection, or recovery.
fault: An inappropriate handling method was selected for the current scenario.
repair: Match each approach to the scenario it is designed for.
escape: Select the correct approach before time expires.

hints: Prevention and avoidance act before the fact; detection and recovery act after.
